_schema.description: Cross-session in-flight task registry for the context-engineering research project.

fields.id: Stable task id, for example T001
fields.title: Short task title
fields.context: Current state and what has already been done
fields.blocker: What is blocking progress, if any

rules: Keep only tasks that really span sessions
Do not duplicate information already stable in handbook/PROJECT_CONTEXT.md
Do not duplicate task detail already stored in plan artifacts

tasks.title: Translate research conclusions into shared Codex workflows
tasks.context: Global and project-level routing docs are in place. Research material has been organized. The first shared skill, `current-docs-sync`, now lives under `system/codex-home/skills/` and is synced to `~/.codex/skills/` for reuse in other projects. The repository's `.codex/` setup is centered on `docs_syncer`, while generic subagent delegation rules now live in the global AGENTS layer and project-specific custom-role rules live in the project AGENTS layer.
tasks.next_action: Add a reusable task contract template and dogfood the layered subagent policy on a real repository task.
